title: Sum Lists
description: Add two numbers represented as reversed linked lists and return the result as a reversed linked list.

content.text: Add two numbers represented as reversed linked lists and return the result as a reversed linked list.

You have two numbers represented by a linked list, where each node contains a single digit. The digits are stored in reverse order, such that the 1's digit is at the head. Write a function that adds the two numbers and returns the sum as a linked list in the same reverse order. Handle different lengths and trailing carry.
